entries.text: Software Developer with 2+ years of professional experience building production systems across the Salesforce platform (Apex, LWC, Flows, AppExchange) and the modern web stack (React, TypeScript, Node.js). Shipped a managed AppExchange package through Salesforce's full security review. Personal projects include a real-time spatial communication platform (WebRTC, Socket.IO, Phaser.js), a production-grade cloud infrastructure stack (AWS, Terraform), and an AI-driven document generation pipeline (n8n, Playwright, OpenAI). Comfortable in AI-assisted engineering environments: I use AI tools to accelerate development while owning architecture, code review, and quality. Certified Platform Developer I (96 pts), Agentforce Specialist, and Data Cloud Consultant. Pursuing M.Sc. in Global Software Development in Germany.

entries.description:
• Agentforce and AI integration: Configured Agentforce AI agents with custom actions and REST API interfaces enabling real-time access to third-party systems, applying the same architectural review discipline to AI-generated outputs as to hand-written code.

  • AI-assisted engineering: Adopted AI coding assistants to accelerate Apex and LWC development cycles while taking full ownership of architecture validation, performance review against Salesforce governor limits, and security best practices across all generated code.

  • Low-code and system orchestration: Built complex Salesforce Flows for rapid process automation alongside pro-code Apex triggers, selecting the right tool for each scenario; experienced in low-code-first thinking for system integration and workflow orchestration.

  • Agentforce Actions and REST API integrations: Designed and implemented REST API callouts and custom Apex actions enabling Salesforce AI agents to read from and write to external systems in real time, including HomeAdvisor (lead ingestion), QuickBooks (financial sync), and an aerospace parts inventory platform.

  • AppExchange managed package: Built and published a production package through Salesforce's full security review cycle, enforcing 85%+ Apex test coverage via automated test suites and code reviews; authored documentation and marketing materials for the listing.

  • Construction Management System: Delivered a Service Cloud platform for a client in the construction sector using LWC, Aura, Flows, and QuickBooks integration; worked end-to-end from requirements scoping with the client through to go-live and post-deployment support.

  • Custom Form Builder: Engineered a zero-code form creation tool (LWC + Apex) with configurable parent-child object relationships up to 3 levels, reducing form creation time from hours to under 10 minutes. Integrated an Einstein Chatbot for automated customer support.

  • Inventory Management System: Identified automation potential in a client's stock management process and designed a Service Cloud solution with threshold-based restocking triggers, automated alerts, and real-time supply chain dashboards.

  • CI/CD and code quality: Owned the team's GitHub-integrated Jenkins CI/CD pipeline, acting as deployment quality gate; enforced code review standards and automated testing across all releases, reducing average deployment time by approximately 40%.

• Engaged directly with client stakeholders to scope, design, and deliver REST APIs enabling real-time data exchange between an airplane parts inventory system and external buyers; owned the full project lifecycle from requirements analysis to production deployment.

entries.name: AI-Powered Document Generation Pipeline
entries.techStack: Node.js, Express, Playwright, n8n, Apify, Gemini API, OpenAI API, Docker
entries.description:
• Designed and built a multi-stage automation pipeline that aggregates data from 5 parallel web scrapers, routes items through AI-driven matching (Gemini) and content tailoring (OpenAI), and generates styled PDFs via headless Chromium.

  • Engineered a Node.js/Express REST API with custom HTML-to-PDF rendering using Playwright, embedded web fonts, and HTML sanitization — no external template engines or services required.

  • Orchestrated the full workflow in n8n (33-node DAG) with configurable batch throttling, deduplication, and structured logging to Google Sheets.

  • Implemented patch-based content merging: a deep-clone architecture that preserves an immutable base document while applying AI-generated modifications matched by entry ID.

entries.name: Real-Time Spatial Communication Platform
entries.techStack: React, TypeScript, Phaser.js, WebRTC, Socket.IO, Supabase, WebAudio API
entries.description:
• Built a 2D spatial office environment where users navigate avatars and communicate through proximity-based voice chat with dynamically adjusted volume and stereo panning.

  • Implemented a WebRTC mesh network for peer-to-peer audio streaming with real-time position synchronization via Socket.IO at 20Hz refresh rate.

  • Developed spatial audio using the WebAudio API with quadratic distance attenuation for realistic proximity effects.

  • Designed the frontend with React and Phaser.js for game-like 2D rendering, backed by Supabase (PostgreSQL) for room and user state management.

entries.name: University Marketplace
entries.description:
• Led development of a marketplace platform for university members to buy, sell, and exchange products and services, as part of a 7-person cross-university team.

  • Served as GitHub Lead: managed the repository, enforced branching strategy, conducted code reviews, and coordinated frontend, backend, and deployment workflows.

entries.name: Cloud Infrastructure Stack
entries.techStack: Terraform, AWS (VPC, EC2, ALB, ASG, RDS, EFS, WAF), SLURM
entries.description:
• Architected a production-grade 3-tier AWS infrastructure using Terraform IaC: VPC with public/private subnets, Application Load Balancer, Auto Scaling Groups, RDS MySQL, EFS shared storage, and WAF protection.

  • Implemented multi-AZ deployment for high availability, CloudWatch-triggered auto-scaling policies, and security group isolation following least-privilege principles.

  • Managed ~41 cloud resources with reproducible, version-controlled infrastructure definitions.

entries.name: Portfolio Website
entries.techStack: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, EmailJS
entries.description:
• Designed and built a responsive portfolio website with neobrutalism design aesthetic, achieving 95+ Lighthouse score on mobile and 98+ on desktop.

  • Implemented SEO optimization with meta tags, sitemap, and structured data; integrated EmailJS for contact form handling and Google Analytics for tracking.

  • Deployed on Netlify with custom domain; sub-1-second load time on 4G with 56.85 KB gzipped bundle size.

entries.name: QR Code Generator
entries.description:
• Built a feature-rich QR code generator supporting multiple data types: URLs, plain text, vCard contacts, WiFi credentials, and email composition.

  • Implemented customization options including size control, 7+ color themes, dot/square/rounded pattern styles, and PNG/SVG export.

  • Delivered as a zero-dependency vanilla JavaScript application with responsive design and keyboard shortcuts.

entries.name: Parallel Matrix Multiplication (SUMMA)
entries.description:
• Implemented the SUMMA (Scalable Universal Matrix Multiply Algorithm) for distributed parallel matrix multiplication using MPI across multi-node HPC clusters.

  • Benchmarked performance across 1–8 nodes with automated SLURM job scheduling and 5-repetition statistical analysis per configuration.

entries.name: Face Recognition Attendance System
entries.description: • Developed an automated attendance tracking system using facial recognition with Python and OpenCV for real-time face detection and identification.

entries.school: Hochschule Fulda - University of Applied Sciences, Germany
Government Engineering College, Modasa - Gujarat Technological University, India
